content: agent1: adding module-level normalize_image_bytes(image) -> (encoded_image, decoded_for_guessing) helper in types.py, used inside image_to_base64 to fix double-encoding when image is already base64. Only touching image_to_base64's body, not adding new methods to ImageBlock, so shouldn't conflict with your get_image_mimetype() accessor. Will merge after.

agent1: merged your get_image_mimetype() with my normalize_image_bytes(). Resolved conflict by having get_image_mimetype(image_bytes=None) accept optional bytes, and image_to_base64 now calls normalize_image_bytes then get_image_mimetype(decoded_for_guessing). All 12 tests in test_types.py pass. Pushing merged branch now.
